failedAssertions.reason: All required commands completed successfully after a single xcodebuild retry, but required cross-surface parity evidence is incomplete: daemon readiness reason-code tests are tagged and passing, while app and extension required-command artifacts do not include assertion-tagged readiness reason-code mapping proof.

appliedUpdates.description: Added MC-CROSS retry guidance for transient xcodebuild package/binary artifact resolution failures before classifying assertions as blocked.
